1880760.name: Bullwagon Business
1880760.description:
URBEX is a horror extraction game with CO-OP up to 4 players with a twist - THE MADNESS MECHANIC. You're a squad of cardboard-armored child adventurers travelling with their submarine to dangerous maps to collect TOYS and SUBMARINE PARTS to extract them to their cardboard fort base. Survive by utilizing stealth, teamwork and various items with unique capabilities.

During the run ENEMIES, MAP EVENTS and TIME raise your MADNESS level, causing you to go progressively more and more insane up to a point where you don’t know what is real and what is not. The longer you stay, the more chaos you experience.

You start hearing and seeing things which are not there some of them harmless, the others quite the opposite. However your madness levels are UNIQUE TO YOU - your hallucinations differ from the others. Beware of your madness meter filling up - it might get you in a really sticky situation.

The horrors prey on the weak and lonely, find yourself in a sticky situation and there might not be anyone to save you. Communicate together via proximity voice chat, but use it wisely - YOUR ENEMIES CAN HEAR YOU TOO. Pass items to each others, utilize your kits to your advantage or, should you have the soul of a traitor, use your arsenal to troll your team members. Who are we to tell you what to do?

Time waits for no one. The longer you stay, the harder the experience. Madness rises irreversibly higher as time goes by, plunging you into more chaos. Should you want the challenge, the game features multiple difficulties, making enemies more lethal, madness rising faster and time limits being shorter.
